PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(add|commit)"; then if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "setup.cfg" ]; then ruff format . 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix . 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then npx prettier --write . 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(add|commit)"; then if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "setup.cfg" ]; then ruff format . 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix . 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then npx prettier --write . 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; exit 0'
